posts.author: ajayhinduja25 (Ajay Hinduja)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey team,
I’m Ajay Hinduja from Geneva, Switzerland, working on integrating a CRM to streamline the management of customer data and travel bookings on our website. The idea is to centralize customer information and booking details so we can better track interactions, offer personalized services, and improve our overall workflow.

Regards
Ajay Hinduja Geneva, Switzerland
